description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For the next Saturday exhibition, add 2 of the cheapest available adult day tickets with a 10:00–11:00 entry window to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Start a new application for an adult annual membership, fill in sample personal details, select exactly two interest areas, and submit the form without creating an external account.
tasks.name: Start a new application for an adult annual membership, fill in sample personal details, select exactly two interest areas, and submit the form without creating an external account.
tasks.description: Start a new application for an adult annual membership, fill in sample personal details, select exactly two interest areas, and submit the form without creating an external account.

tasks.instruction: In the layout gallery, filter to N scale steam‑era layouts, sort by rating, and add 3 layouts rated at least 4 stars to your favorites.
tasks.name: In the layout gallery, filter to N scale steam‑era layouts, sort by rating, and add 3 layouts rated at least 4 stars to your favorites.
tasks.description: In the layout gallery, filter to N scale steam‑era layouts, sort by rating, and add 3 layouts rated at least 4 stars to your favorites.

tasks.instruction: Add 3 different shop merchandise items priced under 20 in the site’s currency to your cart, including at least one T‑shirt in size L and at least one mug, keeping the merchandise subtotal under 50 and selecting standard shipping in the cart.

tasks.instruction: Book one child place for a beginner or introductory workshop session happening next month on a Saturday morning for a 10‑year‑old participant.

target_names: Junior Railway Builders – Beginner (2026-04-11 Morning Session)

tasks.instruction: For the upcoming main exhibition, add 2 talks occurring on the same day with non‑overlapping times to your personal schedule.

target_names: Steam Era Operation on a Modern Layout

tasks.instruction: Configure a recurring monthly donation of 10 in the site’s currency directed to the youth‑focused fund, provide contact details, choose an on‑site payment method, and proceed to the final review step without using an external payment service.

tasks.instruction: Locate a free parking option within about 500 meters of the main exhibition venue and save its name and address into a visit‑planning or notes form.

tasks.instruction: In the secondhand marketplace, after filtering to HO scale locomotives priced between 50 and 100 in the site’s currency and in Good or better condition, add 1 listing with the highest seller rating to your cart.
